category_sources: source_facts.description says instant coding answers via the command line; official howdoi docs describe asking coding questions from the console.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is howdoi; official GitHub repository and documentation site use “howdoi”.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the dedicated MkDocs documentation site; official docs site includes introduction, usage, advanced usage, and troubleshooting pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL; official docs site links back to gleitz/howdoi.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a command-line developer-answer tool; official README examples show coding questions and console output.
